name: cleaner
note: Fix missing / definition-like translations on flagged words.

name: translation
note: Active quality pass: main translation + complete meaning list. Wins over the cleaner layers.

name: split
note: Promote a word's distinct practiceable meanings into their own production cards (altMeanings); the reference meaning list (subDefinitions) is repartitioned wholesale, promoted meanings removed.

name: senses
note: Partition each ambiguous English phrase (>=2 producing meaning-slots, incl. promoted altMeanings) into senses + a short production gloss. Sole gloss authority: primaries carry it on `sense`, promoted altMeanings carry `gloss` (stamped by the reducer, §12). Single-sense synonym groups stay gloss-free. Orthogonal field — never conflicts.

name: examples
note: Sense-specific example sentences for ambiguous words.

name: manual
note: Human overrides — highest precedence. May also author a meaning split (decision: split with altMeanings + a repartitioned subDefinitions), overriding the split layer.
